Label: Corrected Claim Resubmission
Corrected Claim Resubmission Meaning: Only do this after coding gives you the correct code or Verfied by CPC Coder NDC & UOB is Valid - Never resubmit without it or Always confirm about the Timely Filling.
Corrected Claim Resubmission Line 1: Coding has confirmed and assigned the correct NDC or HCPCS/CPT code.
Corrected Claim Resubmission Line 2: NDC is 11 digits, no dashes, with qualifier "N4" before it (example: N412345678901).
Corrected Claim Resubmission Line 3: Unit of measure is included — UN (units), ML (milliliters), or GR (grams).
Corrected Claim Resubmission Line 4: Still within the payer's resubmission deadline & Claim is marked as a corrected claim (frequency code 7 or as payer requires).
